texts.desc:
(This card is always treated as an “Archfiend” card.)
You can only use this card name’s (1) and (2) effects once per turn each.
(1) Target 1 “Archfiend” monster you control; it gains 600 ATK, then you can destroy all monsters your opponent controls with lower original ATK than that monster’s ATK.
(2) During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Level 6 Fiend monster with 2500 ATK in your GY; add it to your hand.
texts.name: Makourai, the Lightning Strike
